defs: A color ground with water and gum or other glutinous medium; a color the vehicle of which is water; -- so called in distinction from oil color.
notes: ☞ It preserves its consistency when dried in a solid cake, which is used by rubbing off a portion on a moistened palette. Moist water colors are water colors kept in a semifluid or pasty state in little metal tubes or pans.

defs: A picture painted with such colors.
